description: Card-specific error codes, decline handling, and troubleshooting for Expanded Checkout

INSTRUMENT_DECLINED.description: Card was declined by the issuer
INSTRUMENT_DECLINED.user_message: Your card was declined. Please try a different card or payment method.
actions: Ask buyer to try another card

CARD_EXPIRED.user_message: This card has expired. Please use a different card.

INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS.description: Not enough balance on the card
INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS.user_message: Insufficient funds. Please try a different card.

CVV_FAILURE.user_message: The security code (CVV) is incorrect. Please check and try again.

INVALID_CARD_NUMBER.user_message: Invalid card number. Please check and re-enter.

TRANSACTION_REFUSED.description: Transaction refused by issuer for unspecified reason
TRANSACTION_REFUSED.user_message: Transaction could not be processed. Please try a different payment method.

PAYER_ACTION_REQUIRED.description: Buyer must complete 3D Secure or additional verification
PAYER_ACTION_REQUIRED.user_message: Additional verification required. Please complete the authentication.

AUTHENTICATION_FAILURE.action: Do NOT proceed with capture. Ask buyer to retry or use different card.

AUTHENTICATION_REJECTED.description: 3D Secure authentication was rejected by issuer

CHALLENGE_TIMEOUT.description: Buyer did not complete 3D Secure challenge in time

card_field_validation_errors.INVALID_NUMBER: Card number does not pass Luhn check
card_field_validation_errors.INVALID_EXPIRY: Expiration date is invalid or in the past
card_field_validation_errors.INVALID_CVV: CVV is wrong length for card brand

retry_strategy.backoff: Exponential backoff starting at 1s, max 3 retries

client_side.card_field_errors: Handle onChange events for real-time validation
client_side.submission_errors: Handle errors from card fields submit() call
client_side.3ds_errors: Handle 3D Secure failure in onError callback
